case_title: HEAPES, MARY SYLVIA et al VS MT ZION HOSPITAL/UCSF MT ZION et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,003.64 FILED BY HEAPES, MARY SYLVIA HEAPES, FRANK J AS TO DEFENDANT MT ZION HOSPITAL/UCSF MT ZION LAMBERT, NANCY     RISK MANAGEMENT/UCSF MT ZION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO MT.ZION HOSPITAL RETURNED SIGNED.
CERTIFLED MAIL TO NANCY LAMBERT RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEAPES, MARY SYLVIA HEAPES, FRANK J IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MT ZION HOSPITAL/UCSF MT ZION LAMBERT, NANCY     RISK MANAGEMENT/UCSF MT ZION NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS THIRD PARTY ADJUSTER CANNOT APPEAR FOR DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY THE PLTF. THERE IS A 15 DAY WAITING PERIOD FOR DEFT'S REPONSE.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FIELD BY MARY SYLVIA HEAPES ON 4/8/98 DENIED BY JUDGE. NOTICES SENT TO ALL PATYIES.
COPY OF MOREC RETURNED TO COURT BY MOUNT ZION HOSPITAL MEDICAL RECORDS SERVICES: UNABLE TO IDENTIFY PATIENT MARY SYLVIA HEAPES;
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLTF'S. THERE'S A 15 DAY WAITING PERIOD FOR A REPONDS BY THE DEFT'S.
